title: 14 FX Notes Reports
body_text:
14	FX Notes Reports
14.1	Viewing, Printing, or Downloading FX Notes Reports
FX Notes Managers and Auditors can access reports in FX Notes and view, print, or download them. Report data is available for 25 months.
To view, print, or download FX Notes reports:
Log in to FX Notes as described in Section 6.2, Logging in to FX Notes.
Select
Reports
on the left-hand menu. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Navigate to Reports
To access the Orders report:
Select
Orders
on the left-hand menu. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Select âOrdersâ
Use the drop-down menus to select your filters, including the date range, branches (if you have access to multiple branches), currency, order type, and order status. See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Select Your Filters
Select
Download to CSV
or
Download to XLSX
near the top-right corner of the page if you want to download the report. See Figure 3. To print the report, use the print function in your browser.
To access the Profitability report:
Select
Profitability
on the Reports page. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Select âProfitabilityâ
Use the drop-down menus to select your filters, including the date range, branches (if you have access to multiple branches), currency, order type, and order status, rate type, amount. Then, Select
Generate Report
. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Filter Your Report
Select Download to CSV or Download to PDF
(if available
)
near the top right corner of the page if you want to download the report. If you want to print the report, use the print function in your browser. See Figure 5.
END
